lines.speaker: Resident
lines.content: Excuse me, I heard there is a community event this weekend. What is it about?
lines.cn: 打扰一下，我听说这个周末有个社区活动。是关于什么的？

lines.speaker: Volunteer
lines.content: Yes, we are hosting a neighborhood cleanup and a potluck picnic. Everyone is welcome to join.
lines.cn: 是的，我们要举办社区清洁和 potluck 野餐。欢迎大家参加。

lines.speaker: Resident
lines.content: That sounds fun. What time does it start, and where should I meet everyone?
lines.cn: 听起来很有趣。什么时候开始，我应该在哪里和大家碰面？

lines.speaker: Volunteer
lines.content: We will meet at the community garden at 9 a.m. on Saturday. We will clean the park until noon, then have lunch together.
lines.cn: 我们周六上午9点在社区花园集合。我们会清洁公园到中午，然后一起吃午饭。

lines.speaker: Resident
lines.content: I would love to help. Do I need to bring anything, like cleaning supplies or gloves?
lines.cn: 我很乐意帮忙。我需要带什么吗，比如清洁用品或手套？

lines.speaker: Volunteer
lines.content: We have gloves and bags, but if you have a reusable water bottle, bring it to stay hydrated. Also, bring a dish for the potluck.
lines.cn: 我们有手套和袋子，但如果你有可重复使用的水瓶，带上保持水分。另外，带一道菜来参加potluck。

lines.speaker: Resident
lines.content: I can make my famous pasta salad. My neighbors always love it. How many people usually come?
lines.cn: 我可以做我出名的意面沙拉。邻居们都很喜欢吃。通常来多少人？

lines.speaker: Volunteer
lines.content: Usually around thirty to forty people. It is a great way to meet neighbors and make new friends.
lines.cn: 通常大约30到40人。这是认识邻居和交新朋友的好方式。

lines.speaker: Resident
lines.content: I have been wanting to get more involved in the community. Can I also sign up to volunteer regularly?
lines.cn: 我一直想更多地参与社区活动。我也可以报名定期做志愿者吗？

lines.speaker: Volunteer
lines.content: Absolutely! We have a volunteer group that meets monthly. I will add you to our email list. Welcome to the community!
lines.cn: 当然可以！我们有一个每月聚会的志愿者小组。我会把你加到我们的邮件列表里。欢迎加入社区！
